history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing up, and the cell directly ahead is a floor (.) with no lava or wall. The goal is located two cells ahead and two cells to the right. I can safely move forward to begin the path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom row, third column from left (row7, col4) facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor cell '.' (row6, col4). The goal 'O' is located two cells north and two cells east (row6, col6). The path appears to be clear: move forward to the floor cell, then turn right, then move east twice to reach the goal. The forward move is safe, so I will take it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (upward) as indicated by the '^'. Directly ahead is a wall ('#') so moving forward is impossible. The goal 'O' is two cells to the right (east) with a safe floor cell in between. To move towards the goal, I need to turn clockwise to face east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (6,3) facing north. Directly ahead is an empty cell at (5,3), and two steps ahead is the goal at (4,3). No obstacles or lava in the immediate path. So the next action should be to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>The goal O is directly in front of me, one cell ahead in the direction I am facing. Moving forward will reach the goal.</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>
